prompt: I set generate_new_chunks to true for DHS pregen. Does that mean pregen is permanently adding chunks to my world? My world is already 8GB and I don't want it to balloon. Should I set it to false instead?

assertions.text: Explains that chunks are discarded after LOD building (unloadChunk with save=false)
Correctly states that world size should NOT grow from pregen
Explains what generate_new_chunks=false means (only builds LODs from already-explored chunks)
Does NOT incorrectly claim that generate_new_chunks=true permanently saves generated chunks
